  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Missing sediment trap (drip leg) upstream of the gas appliance connection."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install a sediment trap downstream of the appliance shutoff valve as close to the inlet of the appliance as practical before final inspection."
  ],
  "rationale": "Both the International Fuel Gas Code (IFGC) and NFPA 54 require a sediment trap to be installed downstream of the appliance shutoff valve, as close to the inlet of the appliance as practical, to prevent moisture, scale, and debris from entering the appliance gas controls. The absence of this trap is a code violation.",
  "references": [
    "IFGC Section 408.4",
    "NFPA 54 Section 9.6.8"
  ]
}
